notes: Added Die With a Smile to the songs library.
Replaced the raw full-track MIR bar dump with a musically cleaned chart using intro, verse, pre-chorus, chorus, bridge, and final-outro sections.
Kept the A-major center and the recurring iii-vi-ii-V character while normalizing rough chromatic outliers into a more playable chart.
open_issues: A symbolic chart would still be the right next step if this song needs publication-grade accuracy.
